def negative_variadic_public_api():
    rule_id = "variadic_public_api"
    family = "maintainability"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Public Python functions that expose *args or **kwargs instead of a clearer interface."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
